hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-f|DROP\s+TABLE|firebase\s+deploy\s+--project\s+prod"; then echo "BLOCKED / BLOCCATO: Risky command detected. Ask owner before proceeding. — Comando pericoloso rilevato. Chiedi conferma al proprietario prima di procedere." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "server\.ts$|firestore\.rules$|src/config/admin\.ts$"; then echo "⚠ HIGH-RISK FILE / FILE AD ALTO RISCHIO: $FILE. Double-check the change before continuing. — Verifica attentamente le modifiche prima di procedere." >&2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "node_modules|dist/|scripts/"; then DIR="$(dirname "$FILE")"; while [ "$DIR" != "/" ] && [ "$DIR" != "." ] && [ ! -f "$DIR/tsconfig.json" ]; do DIR="$(dirname "$DIR")"; done; if [ -f "$DIR/tsconfig.json" ]; then cd "$DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -15; fi; fi'
